---
title: "AMS 597 Project"
date: 2026-03-05
author: Shane Patandin, Matthew Tranquada, Vraj Patel, Kaushal Patel, Sur Vaghasiya
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# R Code

``` {r}
data = read.csv("./US_Accidents_March23.csv")
head(data)
```

```{r}
data = fread("./US_Accidents_March23.csv")
head(data)
str(data)

length(data$Zipcode[data$Zipcode == "11790"])
```
# Long Island ZIP Code Filtering
```{r}
data$nzip = as.numeric(data$Zipcode)

li.data = data.frame(subset(data, (nzip >= 11000 & nzip < 11100) | 
                    (nzip >= 11500 & nzip < 11600) | 
                    (nzip >= 11700 & nzip < 12000)))
```
